name: replace_with_agency_directory
notes: Replace example.com with a public agency directory category page. The crawler will follow pagination-like internal links and extract outbound official business websites.

name: replace_with_lawyer_directory
notes: Use only public directory pages. Do not use logged-in directories or sites that disallow crawling.

name: replace_with_dental_directory
notes: Set enabled to true after replacing start_urls and allowed_domains with real public category pages.

name: replace_with_real_estate_directory
notes: Prefer pages that visibly link to agent/team websites. Directory profile pages are not treated as leads when official links are available.
